match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_001",
    "title": "Newsroom Terminal Work",
    "storyBeat": "Establishing the newsroom atmosphere and reporter preparing for the story",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool with focused calm energy."
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_002",
    "title": "Breaking News Alert",
    "storyBeat": "Producer delivers breaking story update; decision to go live",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh urgent energy with crisp night-time realism and implied forward momentum"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene_003",
    "title": "Going Live Decision",
    "storyBeat": "Climactic decision to broadcast live with dramatic tension",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "INT. NEWSROOM - NIGHT",
    "timeOfDay": "night",
    "visualSummary": "Cool focused urgency transitioning into decisive broadcast energy with sensory material details"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
